title: Submission: Recursive Layer Sharing | 13.9 MB | 1.53 BPB
author: negrurv
body:
Hello! Here is my submission for the Parameter Golf challenge.

Architecture Hack:
I completely removed the standard encoder/decoder split and implemented a "Recursive Transformer." The model initializes a single Block of weights and recursively passes the data through that exact same memory block 9 times during the forward pass. I also implemented a weightless RMSNorm (RMSNormNoWeight) to shave off extra kilobytes.

Final Stats (Local H100 Testing):

Model Dimension: 512

Total Compressed Size: 13.9 MB

Validation BPB: 1.5363

Train Time: Completed full 600s wallclock

Thanks for hosting the challenge!
